'''Talrin Youp''' was a [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] from [[Clak'dor VII/Legends|Clak'dor VII]] who worked as a [[Computer/Legends|computer]] [[Programmer/Legends|programmer]] and [[Professor/Legends|professor]] during her lifetime. After traveling [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] as a [[Tech specialist|technical specialist]], she returned with her technical knowledge to become a professor teaching Bith technology at [[Nozho University]] in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Nozho/Legends|Nozho]] on Clak'dor VII. While Youp was the default professor providing instruction on Bith technology to non-Bith students, the overall learning structure at the school caused these students to dropout at a rate or over ninety percent.

==Biography==
Originally from the [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Clak'dor VII/Legends|Clak'dor VII]], Talrin Youp spent a portion of [[Gender/Legends|her]] life traveling through [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] as a [[Tech specialist|technical specialist]] and [[Computer/Legends|computer]] [[Programmer/Legends|programmer]] in a similar fashion to millions of other members of the Bith [[Species/Legends|species]]. She eventually returned to Clak'dor to find work as a teacher and ending up becoming a technology [[Professor/Legends|professor]] at [[Nozho University]], the largest [[University/Legends|university]] on the planet. While teaching at the university, which was located in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Nozho/Legends|Nozho]], Youp's significant knowledge of different [[Language/Legends|languages]] made her the default choice for teaching the large numbers of non-Bith students about Bith technology. While many non-Bith attended Nozho University, the learning structure at the school caused over ninety percent of those students to washout before graduation. However, Youp was able to explain complicated technology such as [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] circuity clearly in ways that novices could understand.<ref name="GATORW" />

==Personality and traits==
Talrin Youp was an extremely intelligent individual who was knowledgeable about different forms of technology and adept at giving detail explanations to people without large amounts of technical knowledge. However, her lack of social skills made it difficult for her to determine if an individual wanted to participate in an in-depth discussion or not, which caused her to unknowingly bore people she conversed with. While Youp was a staunch pacifist like most Bith, she would selectively fight with a [[Stun baton/Legends|stun baton]] if forced into combat, although she preferred to avoid combat when possible.<ref name="GATORW" />

==Skills and abilities==
Due to her experience as an itinerant technical guru, Youp had a vast knowledge of different forms of technology. She was highly skilled in constructing and programming computers and was able to easily repair or disable mechanical devices. Additionally the Bith professor was adept at compiling information through research and careful examination. While she was able to master a large number of languages, she was only marginally skilled in negotiation. Youp was fluent and literate in [[Bith (language)/Legends|Bith]], [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], [[Durese/Legends|Durese]], [[Ithorese/Legends|Ithorese]], and [[Sullustese/Legends|Sullustese]], while she was literate in [[Shyriiwook/Legends|Shyriiwook]]. In addition to her technical skills, Talrin Youp was a capable [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and was skilled at [[Astrogation/Legends|astrogation]]. She was also marginally skilled at playing a [[Kloo horn/Legends|kloo horn]]. Despite her pacifist nature, she was able to use simple [[Melee weapon/Legends|melee weapons]] such as [[Stun baton/Legends|stun batons]] and was versed in the use of [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistols]].<ref name="GATORW" />

==Equipment==
During her time as a professor at Nozho University, Youp carried a [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]] and a stun baton.<ref name="GATORW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Talrin Youp is featured in ''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'', a [[2004]] sourcebook written by [[Craig Robert Carey|Craig R. Carey]], [[Jason Fry]], [[Jeff Quick]], and [[Daniel Wallace]], for the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Revised Core Rulebook|revised edition]] of [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''. The Bith professor is a non-player character featured in the section of the book about Clak'dor VII. As Talrin Youp is intended to be usable as a non-player character in any era, it is impossible to determine the [[List of publishing eras|timeframe]] when she was alive.<ref name="GATORW" />
